subject: LSJ boat demo results
body:
Sea trial of 2003 38 foot Custom Proctor Boat 
 
note the photo below,,,the boat carriers 237 gallons of fuel, their  was 180 
gallons on board.
"notice the pontoons do NOT touch the water, compared  to NANA".
This one owner boat was custom built for Kevin Jaffe of Palm Beach,  he owns 
a Challenger 604 and a large yacht with Helicopter he keeps  abroad.  
Fuel tanks have increased capacity to level the boat, the  center cabin  and 
wrap around window was custom  built, compared to standard Protector 
production boats.
-Top speed 41 kts (47 MPH)
-Tested in 3 to 5 foot wind chop seas at 35 kts, the boat felt  like it came 
out of water, but props never cavitated. Center of Gravity is  perfect in this 
boat.
-cockpit was warm (NO air conditioning). only fans.
-2003 build date, show room new,,,perfect condition.
- 167 hours total time on engines only
- twin Yamaha 225 (4 stroke).
-Radar 
-steering was hard to turn boat compared to Verado power  steering.
 
-(If we installed more horse power to obtain greater speed, we  should make 
sure weight is comparable to currently installed  engines).
Mr. Jaffe is accepting offers, current market value of boat. 
His boat captain, Adam said an offer in the high 200's would be  
accepted,,,for starters.
 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 



**************Wondering what's for Dinner Tonight? Get new twists on family 
favorites at AOL Food.      
(http://food.aol.com/dinner-tonight?NCID=aolfod00030000000001)

Sea trial of 2003 38 foot Custom Proctor Boat
 
note the photo below,,,the boat carriers 237 gallons of fuel, their was 180 gallons on board.
"notice the pontoons do NOT touch the water, compared to NANA".
This one owner boat was custom built for Kevin Jaffe of Palm Beach, he owns a Challenger 604 and a large yacht with Helicopter he keeps abroad.  
Fuel tanks have increased capacity to level the boat, the center cabin  and wrap around window was custom built, compared to standard Protector production boats.
-Top speed 41 kts (47 MPH)
-Tested in 3 to 5 foot wind chop seas at 35 kts, the boat felt like it came out of water, but props never cavitated. Center of Gravity is perfect in this boat.
-cockpit was warm (NO air conditioning). only fans.
-2003 build date, show room new,,,perfect condition.
- 167 hours total time on engines only
- twin Yamaha 225 (4 stroke).
-Radar

-(If we installed more horse power to obtain greater speed, we should make sure weight is comparable to currently installed engines).
Mr. Jaffe is accepting offers, current market value of boat.
His boat captain, Adam said an offer in the high 200's would be accepted,,,for starters.
